TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Talo’an, title = Talo’an, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talo’an} }

S.FORM: Talo'an Caay kaeca ira mapatireng to talo'an ko niyaro' no Pangcah, 'Amis a 'etal o talo'an han, no Sikolan Pangcah 'adawang han, no Tafalong i sorarataan han, no Falangaw ato pariyapay i sefi han ko pangangan, ano o manmaan to pakayniay i kasaselal a salisin, kayki, konglin no sifana', pakimad, parayray to nakamayan a taneng, sakilafang, mikngkong sapapinang ato tadamaanay a demak no niyaro' maemin itini i talo'an a mireko. O 'adawang hananay no Talawadaw a niyaro' no Pangcah o kalisaotan no kasaselal kora 'arawang, todongay to o picodadan no fa'inayan ato pinanaman to sakicitaneng, mato misanga' to satalakal, mikawit to salil, pakimad to nanorayray a femak, o ratoh a sowal no niyaro' anca o kimad ato minanaman to radiw to kero o sakingodo ato kalomanmaan maemin itini a masaopo parayray, o sakakaay no kasaselal anca o cifenekay toni nakamayan ko papasifana'; caayay ko deng pilayapan to limo'ot ato pireko a mikonglin a 'arawang, itini to ko tadamaanay kakiliniken a mikayki a demak; orasaka, onini a 'arawang pangangan hanto pisoraratan. Sifo' no talo'an masanga' ko tangiro'an, caay kapadeng ko namal to mihecahecaan, todongay to ira ko nisitalaay sanay, mitena' to 'ada a awaen to tamdaw no niyaro' a milipalaw 'mi'eco milood; taliyok no tangiroan ira ko no 'aol ato no kilang a anengan, o sifo' mingataay to ngiro no kalas to kamaro'an, doedo to sakaka kaka sato ko kamaro'an, sasafaay to no selal i kaikor to miraay to tangiroan. Orasaka, pakayni to fa'inayan no Pangcah, nano pakarongay misatapang itini to i talo'an misa'icel to tireng, minanam to sakiwidang,\ ciramod ho deng ira ko tadamaanay a demak anca ira konotireng todong tatayalen ta materek i taloan, ta mangaay to miliyas to kato'asan no tireng ato kananaman a kamaro'an- O talo'an.
S.PHON: taɾo~uʡan ʦaaj kaəʦa ira mapatirəŋ to~u taɾo~uʡan ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ, ʡamis a ʡətaɾ o~u taɾo~uʡan ħan, no~u siko~uɾan paŋʦaħ ʡaɬ~ɮawaŋ ħan, no~u tafaɾo~uŋ i so~urarataan ħan, no~u faɾaŋaw ato~u parijapaj i səfi ħan ko~u paŋaŋan, ano~u o~u manmaan to~u pakajniaj i kasasəɾaɾ a saɾisin, kajki, ko~uŋɾin no~u sifanaʡ, pakimaɬ~ɮ, parajraj to~u nakamajan a tanəŋ, sakiɾafaŋ, mikŋko~uŋ sapapinaŋ ato~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ maəmin itini i taɾo~uʡan a mirəko~u. o~u ʡaɬ~ɮawaŋ ħananaj no~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ o~u kaɾisao~utan no~u kasasəɾaɾ ko~ura ʡarawaŋ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u o~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan no~u faʡinajan ato~u pinanaman to~u sakiʦitanəŋ, mato~u misaŋaʡ to~u sataɾakaɾ, mikawit to~u saɾiɾ, pakimaɬ~ɮ to~u nano~urajraj a fəmak, o~u rato~uħ a so~uwaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ anʦa o~u kimaɬ~ɮ ato~u minanaman to~u raɬ~ɮiw to~u kəro~u o~u sakiŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ato~u kaɾo~umanmaan maəmin itini a masao~upo~u parajraj, o~u sakakaaj no~u kasasəɾaɾ anʦa o~u ʦifənəkaj to~uni nakamajan ko~u papasifanaʡ; ʦaajaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəŋ piɾajapan to~u ɾimo~uʡo~ut ato~u pirəko~u a miko~uŋɾin a ʡarawaŋ, itini to~u ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kakiɾinikən a mikajki a ɬ~ɮəmak; o~urasaka, o~unini a ʡarawaŋ paŋaŋan ħanto~u piso~uraratan. sifo~uʡ no~u taɾo~uʡan masaŋaʡ ko~u taŋiro~uʡan, ʦaaj kapaɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u namaɾ to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ira ko~u nisitaɾaaj sanaj, mitənaʡ to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa a awaən to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ a miɾipaɾaw ʡmiʡəʦo~u miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ; taɾijo~uk no~u taŋiro~uan ira ko~u no~u ʡao~uɾ ato~u no~u kiɾaŋ a anəŋan, o~u sifo~uʡ miŋataaj to~u ŋiro~u no~u kaɾas to~u kamaro~uʡan, ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u sakaka kaka sato~u ko~u kamaro~uʡan, sasafaaj to~u no~u səɾaɾ i kaiko~ur to~u miraaj to~u taŋiro~uan. o~urasaka, pakajni to~u faʡinajan no~u paŋʦaħ, nano~u pakaro~uŋaj misatapaŋ itini to~u i taɾo~uʡan misaʡiʦəɾ to~u tirəŋ, minanam to~u sakiwiɬ~ɮaŋ,\ ʦiramo~uɬ~ɮ ħo~u ɬ~ɮəŋ ira ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak anʦa ira ko~uno~utirəŋ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ tatajaɾən ta matərək i taɾo~uan, ta maŋaaj to~u miɾijas to~u kato~uʡasan no~u tirəŋ ato~u kananaman a kamaro~uʡan- o~u taɾo~uʡan.
S.FORM: Talo'an Caay kaeca ira mapatireng to talo'an ko niyaro' no Pangcah, 'Amis a 'etal o talo'an han, no Sikolan Pangcah 'adawang han, no Tafalong i sorarataan han, no Falangaw ato pariyapay i sefi han ko pangangan, ano o manmaan to pakayniay i kasaselal a salisin, kayki, konglin no sifana', pakimad, parayray to nakamayan a taneng, sakilafang, mikngkong sapapinang ato tadamaanay a demak no niyaro' maemin itini i talo'an a mireko. O 'adawang hananay no Talawadaw a niyaro' no Pangcah o kalisaotan no kasaselal kora 'arawang, todongay to o picodadan no fa'inayan ato pinanaman to sakicitaneng, mato misanga' to satalakal, mikawit to salil, pakimad to nanorayray a femak, o ratoh a sowal no niyaro' anca o kimad ato minanaman to radiw to kero o sakingodo ato kalomanmaan maemin itini a masaopo parayray, o sakakaay no kasaselal anca o cifenekay toni nakamayan ko papasifana'; caayay ko deng pilayapan to limo'ot ato pireko a mikonglin a 'arawang, itini to ko tadamaanay kakiliniken a mikayki a demak; orasaka, onini a 'arawang pangangan hanto pisoraratan. Sifo' no talo'an masanga' ko tangiro'an, caay kapadeng ko namal to mihecahecaan, todongay to ira ko nisitalaay sanay, mitena' to 'ada a awaen to tamdaw no niyaro' a milipalaw 'mi'eco milood; taliyok no tangiroan ira ko no 'aol ato no kilang a anengan, o sifo' mingataay to ngiro no kalas to kamaro'an, doedo to sakaka kaka sato ko kamaro'an, sasafaay to no selal i kaikor to miraay to tangiroan. Orasaka, pakayni to fa'inayan no Pangcah, nano pakarongay misatapang itini to i talo'an misa'icel to tireng, minanam to sakiwidang,\ ciramod ho deng ira ko tadamaanay a demak anca ira konotireng todong tatayalen ta materek i taloan, ta mangaay to miliyas to kato'asan no tireng ato kananaman a kamaro'an- O talo'an.
S.PHON: taɾo~uʡan ʦaaj kaəʦa ira mapatirəŋ to~u taɾo~uʡan ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ, ʡamis a ʡətaɾ o~u taɾo~uʡan ħan, no~u siko~uɾan paŋʦaħ ʡaɬ~ɮawaŋ ħan, no~u tafaɾo~uŋ i so~urarataan ħan, no~u faɾaŋaw ato~u parijapaj i səfi ħan ko~u paŋaŋan, ano~u o~u manmaan to~u pakajniaj i kasasəɾaɾ a saɾisin, kajki, ko~uŋɾin no~u sifanaʡ, pakimaɬ~ɮ, parajraj to~u nakamajan a tanəŋ, sakiɾafaŋ, mikŋko~uŋ sapapinaŋ ato~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ maəmin itini i taɾo~uʡan a mirəko~u. o~u ʡaɬ~ɮawaŋ ħananaj no~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ o~u kaɾisao~utan no~u kasasəɾaɾ ko~ura ʡarawaŋ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u o~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan no~u faʡinajan ato~u pinanaman to~u sakiʦitanəŋ, mato~u misaŋaʡ to~u sataɾakaɾ, mikawit to~u saɾiɾ, pakimaɬ~ɮ to~u nano~urajraj a fəmak, o~u rato~uħ a so~uwaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ anʦa o~u kimaɬ~ɮ ato~u minanaman to~u raɬ~ɮiw to~u kəro~u o~u sakiŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ato~u kaɾo~umanmaan maəmin itini a masao~upo~u parajraj, o~u sakakaaj no~u kasasəɾaɾ anʦa o~u ʦifənəkaj to~uni nakamajan ko~u papasifanaʡ; ʦaajaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəŋ piɾajapan to~u ɾimo~uʡo~ut ato~u pirəko~u a miko~uŋɾin a ʡarawaŋ, itini to~u ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kakiɾinikən a mikajki a ɬ~ɮəmak; o~urasaka, o~unini a ʡarawaŋ paŋaŋan ħanto~u piso~uraratan. sifo~uʡ no~u taɾo~uʡan masaŋaʡ ko~u taŋiro~uʡan, ʦaaj kapaɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u namaɾ to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ira ko~u nisitaɾaaj sanaj, mitənaʡ to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa a awaən to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ a miɾipaɾaw ʡmiʡəʦo~u miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ; taɾijo~uk no~u taŋiro~uan ira ko~u no~u ʡao~uɾ ato~u no~u kiɾaŋ a anəŋan, o~u sifo~uʡ miŋataaj to~u ŋiro~u no~u kaɾas to~u kamaro~uʡan, ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u sakaka kaka sato~u ko~u kamaro~uʡan, sasafaaj to~u no~u səɾaɾ i kaiko~ur to~u miraaj to~u taŋiro~uan. o~urasaka, pakajni to~u faʡinajan no~u paŋʦaħ, nano~u pakaro~uŋaj misatapaŋ itini to~u i taɾo~uʡan misaʡiʦəɾ to~u tirəŋ, minanam to~u sakiwiɬ~ɮaŋ,\ ʦiramo~uɬ~ɮ ħo~u ɬ~ɮəŋ ira ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak anʦa ira ko~uno~utirəŋ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ tatajaɾən ta matərək i taɾo~uan, ta maŋaaj to~u miɾijas to~u kato~uʡasan no~u tirəŋ ato~u kananaman a kamaro~uʡan- o~u taɾo~uʡan.
